summary: Phase 14 - Frontend testing of Media Planner, Insertion Orders, and Campaign Wizard features. Fixed critical bug in InsertionOrders.jsx - SelectItem with empty value causing runtime error. All tested features are working correctly.

issues: Console warnings from Recharts about chart dimensions during rendering - non-blocking

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: SelectItem with empty value="" causing runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed SelectItem value from empty string '' to 'none' for the campaign selection dropdown, and updated handleCreateIO to convert 'none' back to empty string before API call

critical_code_review_comments: All three new features (Media Planner, Insertion Orders, Campaign Wizard) are fully functional
Navigation links for Media Planner and Insertion Orders are properly added to sidebar
All 8 Campaign Wizard steps are present with proper navigation between them
Line Item recommendations panel displays correctly in Insertion Orders
Industry benchmarks display correctly for Display, Video, Native, CTV, Audio formats
seed_data_creation: Created test IO 'Test IO Automated' and Line Item 'Test Line Item' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features implemented and tested: 1) Media Planner at /media-planner with forecasting and strategy recommendations (MOCKED APIs: POST /api/media-planner/forecast, POST /api/media-planner/recommend-strategy, POST /api/line-items/recommend), 2) Insertion Orders at /insertion-orders with full CRUD for IOs and Line Items, 3) Campaign Wizard at /campaigns/new with 8-step advanced campaign creation wizard. All navigation links added to sidebar.

media_planner.campaign_planning_parameters: PASS - Budget, Duration, Goal, Creative Type fields present
media_planner.forecast_results: PASS - Shows Impressions, Reach, Clicks, Conversions, CPM, Confidence
media_planner.strategy_recommendations: PASS - Shows Bidding Strategy, Frequency Cap, Pacing, Priority Inventory
media_planner.industry_benchmarks: PASS - Display, Video, Native, CTV, Audio formats with CTR, CVR, CPM data

insertion_orders.stats_cards: PASS - Total IOs, Total Line Items, Total Budget, Active IOs
insertion_orders.io_expansion: PASS - Shows line items section when expanded
insertion_orders.line_item_recommendations: PASS - Shows Site Retargeting, Prospecting, Lookalike options
insertion_orders.crud_operations: PASS - Create IO and Line Item tested successfully

campaign_wizard.8_steps_visible: PASS - Campaign overview, Budget & bidding, Targeting, Audience, Creatives, Schedule & pacing, Brand safety, Measurement
campaign_wizard.step1_overview: PASS - Campaign name, Business/Product, Primary Goal (8 options), KPI selection
campaign_wizard.step2_budget: PASS - Currency, Daily Budget, Total Budget, Bidding Strategy (6 options), Pacing, Inventory Sources, Environments, Performance Forecast
campaign_wizard.step3_targeting: PASS - Geography (16 countries), Device, Contextual, Technical tabs with radius-based targeting
campaign_wizard.step4_audience: PASS - Demographics (Age, Gender, Income, Languages), Lookalike Modeling

mocked_apis_note: Media Planner forecasting uses mock data based on industry benchmarks - YouTube/GDN real API integrations flagged for later implementation
